item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 1min Padraic Mannion discusses @Galway_GAA opening round @gaaleinster SHC victory over @KilkennyCLG at Pearse Stadium #GAA
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-galway-3 … 160

item.title: hoganstandgaa: hoganstand.com @hoganstandgaa · 3min Burke denies Offaly at the death while Wexford come good in second-half against Kil
item.description: hoganstand.com @hoganstandgaa · 3min Burke denies Offaly at the death while Wexford come good in second-half against Kildare http:// dlvr.it/TS65zf 88

item.title: GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 8min "He's a great kid, and I can't talk highly enough about Charlie and what he's gone through
item.description:
GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 8min "He's a great kid, and I can't talk highly enough about Charlie and what he's gone through the last 6 months"
@Offaly_GAA manager Johnny Kelly hails his captain Charlie Mitchell after his return from a heart condition, leading by example with a masterclass and a deserved MOTM Mostrar más 1 3 585

item.title:
GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 14min High risk, high reward
Just 2 weeks back in full training, and Charlie Mitchell is named
item.description:
GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 14min High risk, high reward
Just 2 weeks back in full training, and Charlie Mitchell is named your MOTM after putting on a show in Tullamore. What a man! 1 5 648
